  • -
    2.Speaker 0: O Hail, true Chosen. May you bring death wherever you walk.ORI_DarkUrge_State_BhaalAcceptedDark Urge

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Global

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 008ed12b-af3e-80e7-43de-48e1961dd218Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h258f6af2gdc92g44e0g894ag8088f9f9ba95Text UUID: 9932ed8c-4ed2-467a-a02b-8a58c8a63833Timeline Phase Index: 0Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 008ed12b-af3e-80e7-43de-48e1961dd218Timeline Phase Duration: 16.62sTimeline Phase Shots: 0Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      331.Speaker 0: You gaze upon your disgraced kin, those who were sacrificed where you were raised up.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a5cd64f7-d1d4-3278-8d03-402ed2dc55b3Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h4526c351g9bcag49b9g88dbgdb407d0fb611Text UUID: 62b08b82-851b-4274-8cf0-aec6ef5e7d3eGroup ID: 008ed12b-af3e-80e7-43de-48e1961dd218Group Index: 1
      • +

              106.No Speaker: Alias to Node 174LOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_Sarevok_WhoIs

              Flags and Tags

              settype Global
              • LOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_Sarevok_WhoIs {04ecd9da-17b7-cf2d-aa20-ba5fa0a6c7ad} = True
              • +
                174.No Speaker: Alias to Node 136, Node 502, Node 457, Node 343
                • +
                  136.Player: My idol, my hero, even in death.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 40880250-6ba9-5dd6-b0d6-367b22c5f6d9Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hbd3fedb9g8cb1g4bf4g8173g91eaeadfa30dText UUID: d3e5ef92-7e50-4869-9bee-bff79b76c8f5Show Once: True
                  • +
                    81.Speaker 0: Silence, spawn. Our undeaths are not to be admired. They are a punishment for our failures.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1fd4cf73-2cbc-00a6-5345-bdb8a01335c7Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h8ed8e002gfa78g4355g831ag7470399ca9e4Text UUID: 060a417b-dda3-4395-b40c-df6bab6f466bTimeline Phase Index: 125Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1fd4cf73-2cbc-00a6-5345-bdb8a01335c7Timeline Phase Duration: 11.37sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • +
                      271.Speaker 0: We honoured Bhaal with our deaths, but he dragged us into these husked forms, to bring the lash upon the Gate, and nurse his dread cult in its dormant years.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 82ec0a3e-b267-5ecb-371a-444fedf26813Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: ha2546867g0453g4529g84bfg99818a3eed19Text UUID: 2687a30f-bf4a-4e16-9e48-ad8124c1a701Timeline Phase Index: 44Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 82ec0a3e-b267-5ecb-371a-444fedf26813Timeline Phase Duration: 15.87sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                      • +
                        232.Speaker 0: We preside over the Tribunal, which has initiated many assassins into the ranks in the Temple. Here we remain until another of our line ends time itself.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 740932b8-e7c6-d207-4efb-487dca0ef5faSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h2f2e4884gcc0ag466fga5c6ga04e77af5901Text UUID: f7bf2d7a-5e7d-493d-90c7-490c724bdc3aTimeline Phase Index: 162Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 740932b8-e7c6-d207-4efb-487dca0ef5faTimeline Phase Duration: 18sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1826.62s
                        • +
                          246.Player: And I will be that world-ender.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 783f479b-8e38-2c5d-5812-aa45119a1f11Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h3a614ae3g455fg49fegadfbg2f41f68ef362Text UUID: f30fd4b6-9a62-4414-8341-9df322aaaa59Show Once: True
                          • +
                            365.Speaker 0: Unholy Chosen, of course you are above needing to prove yourself to the Tribunal.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b608a721-0fcb-ed21-c4b4-7425e1fb489aSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h6d4fb076gf7f6g4d03gb9e6g3cfc609f9910Text UUID: 474bf5f0-633e-421a-8928-ed53b2f438aeTimeline Phase Index: 134Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b608a721-0fcb-ed21-c4b4-7425e1fb489aTimeline Phase Duration: 34.79sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Location Changes: OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 1416.37s; Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1419.21sGroup ID: b608a721-0fcb-ed21-c4b4-7425e1fb489aGroup Index: 0
                            • +
                              42.Speaker 0: But the truth of Bhaal's will remains. Any Bhaalspawn who can kill a Chosen has a hope of becoming the Chosen themselves.FactionHostileToPlayerGroupAfterDialog

                              Flags and Tags

                              settype Object | speaker 0 Speaker 0
                              • FactionHostileToPlayerGroupAfterDialog {d73ce44b-1b9a-2e02-f29a-d8e9e68c7edc} = True

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0ff980a8-c02f-72c1-238c-6c45315ccc00Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h4f21101cgfc8eg48d7ga71agb155b360ac03Text UUID: 0922c378-450f-402d-9b83-a052219fe714Group ID: b608a721-0fcb-ed21-c4b4-7425e1fb489aGroup Index: 1
                              • +
                                310.Speaker 0: I fear we must kill one another. It is Father's way. Two Children must not both leave a holy site alive.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9ac0ce21-8993-3e8a-f5bb-d0a9948d565dSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h632a9b5fg17dbg4361ga012g4be403d3a176Text UUID: 1a24ff55-a326-4612-9fdf-09f0b899bc00Group ID: b608a721-0fcb-ed21-c4b4-7425e1fb489aGroup Index: 2
                                • +
                                  115.Player: You don't have a hope in the Hells of defeating me.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 35cb1322-9183-8cbc-d7ec-1b1a460fdc14Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hdc63236egeb68g4989gbe52g2e20bd5fdfd5Text UUID: cd7c6c22-e463-4491-a1ee-5e2aab0dda17Show Once: True
                                  • +
                                    216.Speaker 0: My aching bones still feel every spark of pain from the crystalline moment of my death.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6bf43225-f5d7-2926-4dc1-ee311a00ffbdSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hc8911e5bg7874g4661gad0agfcf9f9c29dffText UUID: 966c1b79-4f33-4803-930b-f7195481fe0dTimeline Phase Index: 107Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6bf43225-f5d7-2926-4dc1-ee311a00ffbdTimeline Phase Duration: 18.86sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 1084.9s; Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1088.15sGroup ID: 6bf43225-f5d7-2926-4dc1-ee311a00ffbdGroup Index: 0
                                    • +
                                      98.Speaker 0: Even if I cannot defeat you, perhaps at last he will let me die.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2c7cb043-0ca3-961f-bccb-c55e9c0860f6Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h9139f702g77e4g4e68g8d32gf784d8081b3bText UUID: 81692905-a3fa-4bbe-8c2b-241723e5caeeGroup ID: 6bf43225-f5d7-2926-4dc1-ee311a00ffbdGroup Index: 1
                                      • +

                                          • +
                                            239.No Speaker: Alias to Node 133

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: AliasUUID: 75a132ec-01a1-4f76-960d-8fcce8682811Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)Unmapped Attributes: optional
                                            • •
                                              133.Speaker 0: Let us die, Chosen. As only Bhaalspawn can die. [End]

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3eb7cd51-0b08-073f-2be9-67355bea1b57Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h3bad4a65g1a61g4250g893eg8e026786c181Text UUID: 1b53e199-9f32-4b85-94f8-565ca4636e25Timeline Phase Index: 188Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3eb7cd51-0b08-073f-2be9-67355bea1b57Timeline Phase Duration: 8.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
                                • +
                                  93.Player: That's pure delusion. Bhaal would never anoint you as the Chosen, worm.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 287ea092-e548-755a-c455-d130711b6a44Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hd4f2dbccg5e13g4a75gb9d0ga4b56f467455Text UUID: fddacf77-9e71-434f-9a66-f951d1b0b828Show Once: True
                                  • See Node 216 (Speaker 0) My aching bones still feel every spark of pain from the crystalline moment of my death.
                                • +
                                  272.Player: What a treat. Just like your granddaughter was, gargling on her own blood.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 83012737-2df7-52cf-a4c6-dc0e60f78a6aSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hea110d93gbbfag4c55g9ce7geba4b51a5545Text UUID: 52e2fba7-c849-4cdc-aa72-07e61c8dc181Show Once: True
                                  • +
                                    77.Speaker 0: I thank you for killing my granddaughter. She could not have been dispatched by better. Nor could I.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1eb9e440-10a3-a22a-7c00-de8a88cc7e14Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: ha336cd06g6141g4c5ag9b38g56d5cbd21511Text UUID: 1250bfc6-f448-4a16-a7af-be974fc269eaTimeline Phase Index: 126Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1eb9e440-10a3-a22a-7c00-de8a88cc7e14Timeline Phase Duration: 8.54sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1318.7s
                                    • •

                                • +
                                  520.Player: To arms, then. In Bhaal's name.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: faca5f7b-f77b-671b-d89d-ded7b1451b41Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h4cf6ba62g7fbag4349ga8b7g2679eba7c138Text UUID: ddd4bf03-01ee-49a6-a49a-eb2b4f02ad43Show Once: True

                        • +
                          59.Player: Don't tell me I am to be tested again.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 15e6fdf7-4910-8951-4501-68883a64ebe9Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h797f95deg2c61g4cdbga88dg2f2ef2d05277Text UUID: d5650ef5-3cf3-4afb-98bd-f2f854060efcShow Once: True
                          • See Node 365 (Speaker 0) Unholy Chosen, of course you are above needing to prove yourself to the Tribunal.
                        • +
                          56.Player: What trials are set upon them?

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 13f90728-b1e9-6595-7bad-70fb1746c340Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hbcf36d0cgadbdg417fgb7b4g1825920c9648Text UUID: 6c709279-3aeb-4247-8b01-ca1a244a138aShow Once: True
                          • +
                            416.Speaker 0: They must craft a series of kills, reaping divine tragedy and greater terror besides. At the last, an innocent must be gutted while the Tribunal judges the initiate's knife-hand.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ceb4b815-fcc7-de27-fba8-ab9bf7da5dcaSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h58c74894gb1bag4b64gb8bcge788ea82c350Text UUID: 0046f706-99f0-44ca-ab6e-42456036d188Timeline Phase Index: 95Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ceb4b815-fcc7-de27-fba8-ab9bf7da5dcaTimeline Phase Duration: 37.29sTimeline Phase Shots: 7Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 946.84s; OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 952.6s; Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 955.34sGroup ID: ceb4b815-fcc7-de27-fba8-ab9bf7da5dcaGroup Index: 0
                            • +
                              436.Speaker 0: I suppose there will not be the need for the Tribunal, now a true prophet of Bhaal has arisen again. You will name your new Unholy Assassins directly.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d65e4d5e-92e1-ab58-fb68-8984b141f43dSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hebee0b08g7126g4eb9g8ff2g5c5274a2ab61Text UUID: 8ec76d39-b867-42a9-9054-74537e864f67Group ID: ceb4b815-fcc7-de27-fba8-ab9bf7da5dcaGroup Index: 1
                              • •

                • +
                  502.Player: Why are you pieces of jerky still alive?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ef17716b-1d7f-45c7-bae5-f363a35db608Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h7565698cgcae6g4084g9609g2062f6e55356Text UUID: a7c2ca28-54ee-41e1-9252-c9f99d3f2723Show Once: True
                  • See Node 271 (Speaker 0) We honoured Bhaal with our deaths, but he dragged us into these husked forms, to bring the lash upon the Gate, and nurse his dread cult in its dormant years.
                • +
                  457.Player: Pathetic. Too afraid to die when you should have?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e00967ec-9813-6539-ce51-a4f6d17c3946Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h0eb59c15g7438g41a5g88c2g5e8cdd21c354Text UUID: 1ee3862b-94d2-426b-83b0-017b62fb8ddcShow Once: True
                  • See Node 271 (Speaker 0) We honoured Bhaal with our deaths, but he dragged us into these husked forms, to bring the lash upon the Gate, and nurse his dread cult in its dormant years.
                • +
                  343.Player: Ha. I killed Jaheira: your own slaughterer.ORI_DarkUrge_State_KilledJaheira

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Object | speaker 2 Player
                  • ORI_DarkUrge_State_KilledJaheira {204d3243-72b3-438c-9144-eb2a0bf767ff} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: aeca45b0-45a0-4cc2-73d8-ef5d3df7331fSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h7e3667c4g2210g49b7g8a91gf8f97dca1c2aText UUID: 0513186f-f4bd-4b03-addf-6f3af163cd92Show Once: True
                  • +
                    27.Speaker 0: Exquisite. I claim afore Father that I desire all deaths equally. In my private worship, though, I have found myself turning again and again to prayers for her demise.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0a963e84-3aff-b9ca-a498-bc391a9a9e57Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: ha505aea0gf7fdg4da5gbbffg45c5802a3c2aText UUID: 5a180d1d-d79c-4de0-86b6-33e1fbd46921Timeline Phase Index: 129Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0a963e84-3aff-b9ca-a498-bc391a9a9e57Timeline Phase Duration: 22.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • See Node 271 (Speaker 0) We honoured Bhaal with our deaths, but he dragged us into these husked forms, to bring the lash upon the Gate, and nurse his dread cult in its dormant years.
  • -
    308.Speaker 0: The weakest worm of a Bhaalspawn, the holy fool. Whelp, know that Bhaal has a worse fate in stall for you than you could ever fear.
    ORI_DarkUrge_State_BhaalDisappointedDark UrgeFactionHostileToPlayerGroupAfterDialog

                  383.Speaker 0: These are not aspirants. You have brought traitors of Bhaal into our midst. LOW_MurderTribunal_Sarevok_Trial_InteractedMinscJaheira

                                • +
                                  292.Player: What fate does Bhaal have in store for me?ORI_DarkUrge_State_BhaalDisappointed

                                  Flags and Tags

                                  checktype Global
                                  • ORI_DarkUrge_State_BhaalDisappointed {fb48dba0-24fd-e9ae-b6f9-4fadb9f8c4a0} = True

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8fb3dc36-606a-3000-152c-8910d672c872Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hd64569c3gd003g4728gb81fg36a9554e3adfText UUID: a91ac7bc-5c30-4f9b-9047-250f543e2151Show Once: True
                                  • +
                                    189.Speaker 0: Fate is written, and I have read it... you shall know soon enough.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5d3beefb-527d-e5cd-2657-0b72aaecb7d4Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h749ffa99g8870g4979gbf40g8fab90092780Text UUID: 306b92a7-f513-4116-9869-4827d3355ec7Timeline Phase Index: 116Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5d3beefb-527d-e5cd-2657-0b72aaecb7d4Timeline Phase Duration: 33.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1177.48sGroup ID: 5d3beefb-527d-e5cd-2657-0b72aaecb7d4Group Index: 0
                                    • +
                                      118.Speaker 0: Know that while I sit here in this husk, and in every moment, experience the crystalline pain of the moment of my death.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 36c9eb58-a429-a72a-749d-c0f00c243ccdSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: he1e63cc0g1b50g438cg9cf3g2107fbcb6bd7Text UUID: c8312cef-c4b3-4ecf-be8e-66e057fbf2beGroup ID: 5d3beefb-527d-e5cd-2657-0b72aaecb7d4Group Index: 1
                                      • +
                                        183.Speaker 0: But my fate is a paradise, compared to the one Father has in store for you.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5912fbac-387e-d3bd-89be-c2934c28be97Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hb15bbfa2g0bbbg47c2g84f4g4f3aa18af262Text UUID: d40b247b-81cd-4570-b66a-aca4b76c4044Group ID: 5d3beefb-527d-e5cd-2657-0b72aaecb7d4Group Index: 2
                                        • •

                                • +
                                  524.Player: Why are you pieces of jerky still alive?

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fd686ff1-8eaf-b3a8-7896-8a3a61919285Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h0dd436a6g32b7g46b9g92fag8ea51358fa07Text UUID: 3bceaf6f-4f29-402e-be40-aa152a584626Show Once: True
                                  • +

                                    • +
                                      313.No Speaker: Alias to Node 220
                                      • +
                                        220.Speaker 0: You were the greatest hope we had for centuries...

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6d875a18-387c-a223-c931-105b1a3bc07fSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h7d2878c7g1cb3g4194g894eg47a8e9c4bdbbText UUID: 30b61854-7796-44c0-aab6-b76b628f2f32Timeline Phase Index: 156Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6d875a18-387c-a223-c931-105b1a3bc07fTimeline Phase Duration: 4.81sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                        • +
                                          168.Player: You're out of luck. Bhaal's hold over me is gone.!ORI_DarkUrge_State_BhaalDisappointedDark Urge

                                          Flags and Tags

                                          checktype Global
                                          • ORI_DarkUrge_State_BhaalDisappointed {fb48dba0-24fd-e9ae-b6f9-4fadb9f8c4a0} = False
                                          checktype Tag | speaker 2 Player
                                          • Dark Urge {cd611d7d-b67d-42b4-a75c-a0c6091ef8a2} = True

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4d8b0a12-648e-3cc6-e468-eeadef101115Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h8ee2d010gffe0g4f46g97fcg8628429cade3Text UUID: b3fb8682-bd40-4429-aa07-cb1dc6367077Show Once: True
                                          • +
                                            125.Speaker 0: His ire may be quiet now, and you may not have become his brutal prophet.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3cf78bb6-fd7c-66c4-929e-613ad69e3780Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h2d352163ga20cg40c4g9d80g93245b67045aText UUID: 13d0cec1-5093-4477-b932-7ecd2de6cf03Timeline Phase Index: 9Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3cf78bb6-fd7c-66c4-929e-613ad69e3780Timeline Phase Duration: 16.71sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 3cf78bb6-fd7c-66c4-929e-613ad69e3780Group Index: 0
                                            • +
                                              22.Speaker 0: But the line is not ended... You carry him with you, deep within. In your Divine Essence.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 08a60165-8447-89cf-e371-dba92a83f135Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hef3756a3g79fdg4821gb8a5g65f3f28bb973Text UUID: b44a1c11-efcb-46eb-972b-bfca19476237Group ID: 3cf78bb6-fd7c-66c4-929e-613ad69e3780Group Index: 1
                                              • •
                                                507.Speaker 0: We have both failed Bhaal, let us die again, this time by each other's hands in his holy site. Each breath you take is an insult to him. [End]

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f55fb04d-1f27-0a31-ad41-137b706441afSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hfc88b03bgc148g445eg8b51gefafd143c3b1Text UUID: cc36bd7b-d4f3-4dd3-abe7-50a291a4a015Timeline Phase Index: 189Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f55fb04d-1f27-0a31-ad41-137b706441afTimeline Phase Duration: 16.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 2167.28s; Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 2170.71sEnd Node: True
                                        • +
                                          393.Player: You're out of luck. I have escaped Bhaal's will.ORI_DarkUrge_State_BhaalDisappointedDark Urge

                                          Flags and Tags

                                          checktype Global

                                          • See Node 125 (Speaker 0) His ire may be quiet now, and you may not have become his brutal prophet.
                                        • +
                                          321.Player: I defeated Orin. You are nothing.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a20d47c4-61de-0d70-1b06-6d86c72997c8Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h154e0c09gffa5g48dfg8f4cg84039dde7346Text UUID: 0d246226-0778-4cc0-9570-f017a1ed560aShow Once: True
                                          • +
                                            314.Speaker 0: You sacrificed your kin, the most sacred act a Bhaalian could conduct, and summoned him with her blood.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9cc285b8-f448-51ad-c473-1a00aafee749Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hba77bf2ag4434g4597g9583gd4d61fd82f9fText UUID: d2bea511-202c-461b-9a75-38bd476d1489Timeline Phase Index: 29Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9cc285b8-f448-51ad-c473-1a00aafee749Timeline Phase Duration: 21.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 9cc285b8-f448-51ad-c473-1a00aafee749Group Index: 0
                                            • +
                                              398.Speaker 0: Just to mingle your pissing fear with her gall-puddle. There are no words for this blasphemy.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c3d4971a-d5de-d920-1eac-c71211761422Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hea5bcf4bg7114g43abg920dg9ed53398c1ebText UUID: cecac298-eb56-497c-8525-e91e330dd298Group ID: 9cc285b8-f448-51ad-c473-1a00aafee749Group Index: 1
                                              • See Node 507 (Speaker 0) We have both failed Bhaal, let us die again, this time by each other's hands in his holy site. Each breath you take is an insult to him.
                                        • +
                                          404.Player: I will save this city. A Bhaalspawn can have a true heart.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c69b804d-80e1-18ac-bf31-46c3c35fce06Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h033ffaebgf14cg4c47g80bfg1aba1397e2f3Text UUID: 2cb2b33d-4fae-4c8f-82c8-9e06f0bef013Show Once: True
                                          • +
                                            285.Speaker 0: It may not be this decade, may not be this century, but a true Spawn, our Dread Father incarnate, will one day be born, and will destroy this city.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8c0cfd6f-a464-6854-2b69-bf55b72749c7Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h1eb52464g1404g4d2cg8b2dg10bdbb773fefText UUID: 668a64bd-d8ec-4f28-9d5e-d804fa150115Timeline Phase Index: 47Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8c0cfd6f-a464-6854-2b69-bf55b72749c7Timeline Phase Duration: 16.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

                                • +

        208.Speaker 0: I know my like, child of Bhaal - but I needed to see you slaughter, first. To take life and revel in it.

              337.Narrator: *In years past you brought this man low - foiled his plot to become a god. Now you stand before him, once again. Sarevok Anchev.*LOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_Sarevok_WhoIs

                  60.Speaker 0: Harper worm... the abdicating hero... your keen sense for this city has withered in your absence.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 163f664d-8d0f-d9de-e240-15671d531ceaSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h0031e234gf936g46d5g835cg83f892eaa3ceText UUID: b96b794c-254c-4476-a87d-b7ed4f0cf1f2Timeline Phase Index: 140Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 163f664d-8d0f-d9de-e240-15671d531ceaTimeline Phase Duration: 11.53sTimeline Phase Shots: 3

                      458.Player: Sarevok, Bhaal's least favourite son. Still tied to daddy's apron strings, I see.Jaheira

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Tag | speaker 2 Player
                      • Jaheira {8457eb5f-036c-4143-b6cf-447a9f555c7a} = True

                      • +
                        33.Speaker 0: Your face bears the marks of many years, Jaheira. Your wit, however, does not. Jaheira

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Tag | speaker 2 Player
                        • Jaheira {8457eb5f-036c-4143-b6cf-447a9f555c7a} = True

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0d5063f8-fba8-c7d4-2d1a-fd00109cfb23Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h909c5531ga5cbg4111g932eg1350a2fc6612Text UUID: 721c72af-ed2f-4516-9dea-e580ab24cafcTimeline Phase Index: 132Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0d5063f8-fba8-c7d4-2d1a-fd00109cfb23Timeline Phase Duration: 8.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                        • +
                          195.Speaker 0: You were never more to my Father than a stinging insect - irritating, but irrelevant. And yet you still scrabble for his attention.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f68130c-ac2f-9abb-ba5d-7c851b740447Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h5006a13dge151g4162gbad7g733acea3d9bbText UUID: fa55ee1b-a77e-4924-a1a7-4ebc83447035Timeline Phase Index: 182Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5f68130c-ac2f-9abb-ba5d-7c851b740447Timeline Phase Duration: 13.52sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                          • +
                            88.Speaker 0: You are unworthy of Bhaal's presence, let alone his trial.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 237eb7ba-1b5f-9124-ca6a-9ef514acad80Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h4a3995e0g54d2g4e1fg8cb5g20426618e90fText UUID: 6d19fb5e-31f7-45d9-9a86-0a58fe32c922Timeline Phase Index: 192Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 237eb7ba-1b5f-9124-ca6a-9ef514acad80Timeline Phase Duration: 16.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 237eb7ba-1b5f-9124-ca6a-9ef514acad80Group Index: 0
                            • •
                              108.Speaker 0: But for one purpose you are fit indeed - you will make a fine offering to the Murder Lord. [End]

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 31b04bd8-9bf2-aa34-11be-5c85c8dc064bSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h5118cddcgc5bbg4af7g93b6ge0d7835efa93Text UUID: b91e0e23-53f4-4199-9c25-b61cf362abacEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: 237eb7ba-1b5f-9124-ca6a-9ef514acad80Group Index: 1
                    • +
                      347.Player: While you wriggled 'neath the city's soil like the worm that you are. It will please my hamster to kill you twice, Sarevok.Minsc

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Tag | speaker 2 Player
                      • Minsc {aeb694fc-83fb-452d-819a-b97ba442dc42} = True

                      • +

                    123.Speaker 0: And you... Man of Stone. As you stood a statue, a helpless ornament, your city warped. Changed. Became ripe for the plucking.

                            309.Speaker 0: And you... Man of Stone. As you stood a statue, a helpless ornament, your city warped. Changed. Became ripe for the plucking.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9a785c39-7c75-da47-b878-67c6f82ec360Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hff1ba167gfb75g49fbgbb14gc49ae666bdabText UUID: 8cb45b28-772c-4071-8a6e-5dbb292507f5Timeline Phase Index: 30Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9a785c39-7c75-da47-b878-67c6f82ec360Timeline Phase Duration: 15.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 4
                            • +
                              222.Jaheira: Sarevok, Bhaal's least favourite son. Still tied to daddy's apron strings, I see.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6e107ebd-7960-4834-ba00-2e6abf6f2331Speaker: 6 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hbf144357g8a62g4119gb1eag29166169ded1Text UUID: 73427448-d1e9-4c1f-bac1-fa89b2b7b6f1Timeline Phase Index: 158Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6e107ebd-7960-4834-ba00-2e6abf6f2331Timeline Phase Duration: 8.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                              • +
                                11.Speaker 0: You disappoint me, child of Murder. I expected more of your return.Dark Urge

                                • Dark Urge {cd611d7d-b67d-42b4-a75c-a0c6091ef8a2} = True

                                  408.Narrator: *The history they share may be long gone, but the threat of violence between them is as fresh as newly spilled blood - neither party will let the other walk out of here alive.*

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c842d5e3-7b94-4c89-60f3-a28b02cba186Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h8cb0af49ge0a0g4575g98b0g7e9672e49bc2Text UUID: fad1bc65-7b68-48e7-a44b-d38b10b5ac3eTimeline Phase Index: 94Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c842d5e3-7b94-4c89-60f3-a28b02cba186Timeline Phase Duration: 13.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                  • +
                                    268.Speaker 0: What purpose do you have in bringing these heretics to the court of Bhaal? Speak, or death will be your final word. 607bbdd2-9891-589d-d8b0-53cbd89f03678bbae11e-9e79-ef99-e49b-1217192221ed

                                    • +
                                      278.Player: Wait, how do you know each other?607bbdd2-9891-589d-d8b0-53cbd89f03678bbae11e-9e79-ef99-e49b-1217192221ed

                                      • +
                                        372.Speaker 7: Simple. We beat him about the brow and butt until he was dead.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b86e7a65-07ef-0464-5c3a-fdf123cdcf49Speaker: 7 (Speaker 7)Text Handle: hb3c4e17fg7154g49a5g92fdg41089c46e4feText UUID: 963783ba-d492-485b-9f39-51bac98d1921Timeline Phase Index: 84Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b86e7a65-07ef-0464-5c3a-fdf123cdcf49Timeline Phase Duration: 5.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                        • +
                                          75.Jaheira: Sarevok once fancied himself Bhaal's Chosen, until we put him in his place. Feel no shame for forgetting him - history shall do the same.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1d93cf56-112d-c501-6aec-05392df4fc13Speaker: 6 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hc6e2159eg9f46g4acfgb666g546d0539d6b1Text UUID: 7510aa2e-7a51-43c7-bb61-62cdf4c3d6a6Timeline Phase Index: 144Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1d93cf56-112d-c501-6aec-05392df4fc13Timeline Phase Duration: 12.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                          • •
                                            135.Speaker 0: These two have long meddled in my affairs - and my father's. 607bbdd2-9891-589d-d8b0-53cbd89f03678bbae11e-9e79-ef99-e49b-1217192221ed

                                          • +
                                            317.Speaker 0: You speak of the past - I speak of the future. Well, aspirant? Do the shades of yesterday speak for you, too?

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9e6d7050-f59a-e122-3fa1-7bfc189f147eSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h3220c586g5eadg43c5ga336g5a53c0917cd3Text UUID: 82df4cb2-6915-4b6c-b541-f3111cbc50e7Timeline Phase Index: 12Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9e6d7050-f59a-e122-3fa1-7bfc189f147eTimeline Phase Duration: 24.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 129.51s; Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 140.87sGroup ID: 9e6d7050-f59a-e122-3fa1-7bfc189f147eGroup Index: 0
                                            • +
                                              474.Speaker 0: There are two paths to the Temple of Bhaal: to carve your devotion into flesh, or to be the carcass that is carved upon.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e5b20b85-8076-0afd-c3cf-4e377fc740d8Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h4f202370g4f7fg4d0bgb639g638a891a2dbaText UUID: e2bb0d3c-61a4-4a0f-8541-7362a55be40aGroup ID: 9e6d7050-f59a-e122-3fa1-7bfc189f147eGroup Index: 1
                                              • +
                                                45.Player: I answer for myself, Sarevok - and Minsc and Jaheira answer to me. They won't be a problem.607bbdd2-9891-589d-d8b0-53cbd89f03678bbae11e-9e79-ef99-e49b-1217192221edLOW_MurderTribunal_State_ToldSarevokMinscJaheiraAnswerToYou

                                                • +
                                                  451.Jaheira: You make promises that aren't yours to keep. Take care that their breaking does not break something more.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dd79c44e-1f60-b88a-d869-c384f667e49bSpeaker: 6 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hb0b53cd4g0a0fg4a50ga698g45faed06b7f7Text UUID: e97c83a1-de7f-4ec1-843d-adfe591b7caeTimeline Phase Index: 66Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dd79c44e-1f60-b88a-d869-c384f667e49bTimeline Phase Duration: 6.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                                  • +
                                                    202.Speaker 7: If Minsc is certain of one thing, it is that he very much plans on being a problem for Sarevok.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6326b90e-6396-11a5-cde5-42b3c37ae6dbSpeaker: 7 (Speaker 7)Text Handle: hb1aa759dg6239g4ee2gb11fg107dc31a037dText UUID: 8ea7e677-d692-40f1-a0f5-d6f69561eef4Timeline Phase Index: 173Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6326b90e-6396-11a5-cde5-42b3c37ae6dbTimeline Phase Duration: 8.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                                    • +
                                                      475.Speaker 0: I know these two well. I have travelled in their company. Whatever else may be said of them, they answer to no one but themselves. 607bbdd2-9891-589d-d8b0-53cbd89f03678bbae11e-9e79-ef99-e49b-1217192221ed

                                                                55.Jaheira: Is it to be death, then? A better alternative to watching this sick family reunion.note: Jaheira bows before Sarevok, annoyed with the player.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 13f1afe3-bdae-69f0-5cdc-5c5f0999ee00Speaker: 6 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h62a9bc6fge4c0g4a30g86d9gfa43a69a3530Text UUID: f09d52f6-60aa-4d78-a4de-a2629950ce3cTimeline Phase Index: 139Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 13f1afe3-bdae-69f0-5cdc-5c5f0999ee00Timeline Phase Duration: 8.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: Master Dark Urge (d1a4f444-f6c8-46eb-81ba-7b17964e636f) @ 1544.91s; Master Dark Urge (d1a4f444-f6c8-46eb-81ba-7b17964e636f) @ 1551.65sOptional: True

                                                                  154.No Speaker: Alias to Node 464
                                                                  • +
                                                                    464.Speaker 7: You have shown us the colour of your blood. Boo wonders if we had been wiser to spill it on the ground.note: Minsc bows before Sarevok, surprised and sad.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                              328.Speaker 0: Such stillness. Such nobility. Unmarked by your command.

                                                            62.Failure

                                                              18.Speaker 0: You wished to deceive Sarevok and your allies? The intent pleases, but the execution lacks finesse.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 05a9c6b0-d0ac-c490-fd2b-46af114df476Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hc3219ce8g2a47g4724g8542g63d9449a0b90Text UUID: a7bf7a89-f72c-4a5e-8732-f95442339a6fTimeline Phase Index: 161Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 05a9c6b0-d0ac-c490-fd2b-46af114df476Timeline Phase Duration: 24.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 05a9c6b0-d0ac-c490-fd2b-46af114df476Group Index: 0
                                                              • +
                                                                374.Speaker 0: Your hubris has gained the better of you, as mine once did of me. But no more of this act.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bab3780e-0e44-1a3a-f8ed-953e3a3abf11Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h9fb54d39g4d59g4f82ga79bg70b57994cd81Text UUID: 77aa7cc1-5c43-492b-a499-32bdfc142a76Group ID: 05a9c6b0-d0ac-c490-fd2b-46af114df476Group Index: 1
                                                                • •
                                                                  296.Speaker 0: They will not bend to your will. No matter - it will be my pleasure to break you, instead. In my Father's name. [End]607bbdd2-9891-589d-d8b0-53cbd89f03678bbae11e-9e79-ef99-e49b-1217192221ed

                                                                • •
                                                                  41.Speaker 0: She will not bend to your will. No matter - it will be my pleasure to break you both, instead. In my Father's name. [End]607bbdd2-9891-589d-d8b0-53cbd89f0367!8bbae11e-9e79-ef99-e49b-1217192221ed

                                                          • +
                                                            380.Speaker 7: Minsc politely declines your offer to be an offering. I am afraid he is already claimed by Boo.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bc58c1ca-3d50-b404-546a-d014caa17726Speaker: 7 (Speaker 7)Text Handle: h16595dd2g5addg459bg94fbg400e8be25bddText UUID: cc5a9740-78c9-4a1a-ab8b-6b32a1beae3fTimeline Phase Index: 85Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bc58c1ca-3d50-b404-546a-d014caa17726Timeline Phase Duration: 8.37sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                                            • +
                                                              523.Jaheira: You toss allies aside so easily, after everything? If you are so eager to join this worm, then may you both be buried here together.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fc848479-c364-3abe-4887-82684b084a79Speaker: 6 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h085ec1e0gd3b4g4ce9g84a5g3e316deba111Text UUID: 137e0771-8f49-40c3-affb-ab5feeb7cb59Timeline Phase Index: 169Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fc848479-c364-3abe-4887-82684b084a79Timeline Phase Duration: 12.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                                              • +
                                                                151.Speaker 0: This is a sacrifice my father has long lusted for. But it is not the giving of their lives that will please Bhaal - it is the taking.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 45eeff86-71a8-ca10-e954-c28646691d41Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: ha2b02738g15deg48b3g8ec4g8d8a76400abeText UUID: 25fd39a1-aa11-424c-a802-ca3ea228f6c3Timeline Phase Index: 194Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 45eeff86-71a8-ca10-e954-c28646691d41Timeline Phase Duration: 20.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 45eeff86-71a8-ca10-e954-c28646691d41Group Index: 0
                                                                • •
                                                                  52.Speaker 0: The Tribunal bears witness, aspirant - do not disappoint us. [End]

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1312b34f-e26f-38b1-bfaf-292981be26eaSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: ha106b86cg2a45g4753g82e8g739f4347353bText UUID: a71d7c33-f278-4b7a-bdc0-35f4cd89c19dEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: 45eeff86-71a8-ca10-e954-c28646691d41Group Index: 1
                                                        • +

                                      • +
                                        247.Jaheira: Do not parley with this madman.607bbdd2-9891-589d-d8b0-53cbd89f0367

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Script
                                        • 607bbdd2-9891-589d-d8b0-53cbd89f0367 = True

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 78658225-a237-7632-1b02-80d5a8036cc8Speaker: 6 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h5fac4015gc2efg46a8g9fb5ga80ddbd01b49Text UUID: a0cac07d-2a43-44b3-b23b-670ce2b30a5fTimeline Phase Index: 104Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 78658225-a237-7632-1b02-80d5a8036cc8Timeline Phase Duration: 3.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                        • +
                                          254.Jaheira: Sarevok reclaimed his soul, once - and he still traded it back to his father for a pat on the head. He has earned his second death even more than his first.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7d781e95-2583-f1a7-4bd7-4267a2911ddeSpeaker: 6 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h6edf2c74gc87ag43c5g8cf1gf9a03c0dc825Text UUID: 13b5ad50-52e1-40d5-a269-6bc3d56d0c88Timeline Phase Index: 35Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7d781e95-2583-f1a7-4bd7-4267a2911ddeTimeline Phase Duration: 10.09sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                          • See Node 317 (Speaker 0) You speak of the past - I speak of the future. Well, aspirant? Do the shades of yesterday speak for you, too?
                                      • +
                                        362.Speaker 7: Let us pave our own path. Starting with the kicked buttocks of that one there.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b5360412-cd41-e895-dc00-8af479381409Speaker: 7 (Speaker 7)Text Handle: h87652707g91fag4426g8361g8db0bafd237cText UUID: 9dd7316d-b333-47a4-b971-fcbefab79c70Timeline Phase Index: 54Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b5360412-cd41-e895-dc00-8af479381409Timeline Phase Duration: 7.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                        • +
                                          480.Speaker 7: Sarevok once had his chance to taste of goodness - but he spat it back out. Now he may taste boot-leather instead.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e6a089fa-0706-3a15-bb9a-79cd5e5e14a5Speaker: 7 (Speaker 7)Text Handle: hb19b62b2g9bc9g4377ga841g832b76e73af2Text UUID: bf37651b-bf68-4023-8ea1-18cbb36bab62Timeline Phase Index: 70Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e6a089fa-0706-3a15-bb9a-79cd5e5e14a5Timeline Phase Duration: 10.53sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • See Node 317 (Speaker 0) You speak of the past - I speak of the future. Well, aspirant? Do the shades of yesterday speak for you, too?
                                    • +
                                      213.Player: Would you two like to kill the old man, or shall I?607bbdd2-9891-589d-d8b0-53cbd89f03678bbae11e-9e79-ef99-e49b-1217192221edFactionHostileToPlayerGroupAfterDialog

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      • +
                                        250.Jaheira: You get to my age, you have already done everything. Be my guest.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 79b9d188-3e46-1ad1-828c-678b7a107dffSpeaker: 6 (Jaheira)Text Handle: ha3faeb0bg9596g4e36g8a6bg691eb3e30f17Text UUID: aadbd474-3aca-4498-8fe5-9762afffde47Timeline Phase Index: 102Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 79b9d188-3e46-1ad1-828c-678b7a107dffTimeline Phase Duration: 8.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                        • +
                                          287.Speaker 7: We have already smashed Sarevok's soul from his body once. Boo says it is your turn.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8d733b74-158e-4366-146f-b2b34b215c53Speaker: 7 (Speaker 7)Text Handle: h878e4d79gffa3g478bga27dg9881f6a3d84cText UUID: 1980b09f-0616-420d-9e3e-3dc7037d4d40Timeline Phase Index: 48Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8d733b74-158e-4366-146f-b2b34b215c53Timeline Phase Duration: 7.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                          • +
                                            273.Speaker 0: And so the Harper and the idiot ranger raise their weapons against Sarevok once more.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8349f464-eb81-7f4e-279d-7d226c43a679Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: he130c67dg534fg47e1g8c8bg25782442c4a7Text UUID: 2196aa91-80ff-45b3-ad89-c21e0fd97179Timeline Phase Index: 45Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8349f464-eb81-7f4e-279d-7d226c43a679Timeline Phase Duration: 9.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                            • +
                                              5.Speaker 0: You disappoint me, child of Bhaal. I had heard such tales of you - tales of grandeur, and vile glory. Dark Urge

                                              Flags and Tags

                                              checktype Tag | speaker 2 Player
                                              • Dark Urge {cd611d7d-b67d-42b4-a75c-a0c6091ef8a2} = True

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 00fd7509-ab4e-c78a-4d86-ab4edf5673f2Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h5371e74cg8033g4bc7g8f72g8b8b908a80f6Text UUID: a28693c3-70b9-4f51-a423-ab4bdeeb7d09Timeline Phase Index: 77Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 00fd7509-ab4e-c78a-4d86-ab4edf5673f2Timeline Phase Duration: 35.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 00fd7509-ab4e-c78a-4d86-ab4edf5673f2Group Index: 0
                                              • +
                                                141.Speaker 0: But the company you keep has tainted you, and pulled you from our Father's grace.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 42865126-203a-97a3-a0c0-5b0b4fb81b23Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h2b01864cg9ea2g4885gb4a2gc4996cfacb06Text UUID: 7d71b9e9-68f7-4ced-84d8-47f94c84e5a0Group ID: 00fd7509-ab4e-c78a-4d86-ab4edf5673f2Group Index: 1
                                                • +
                                                  283.Speaker 0: I understand. I once fell to hubris, as you are falling now. But no more.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8afbd039-4563-4833-ce1d-26788e3fcddeSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h7ef07724ga481g4c38gb23bg0677a5556d67Text UUID: 1edcf400-e816-4344-9619-590415bef44aGroup ID: 00fd7509-ab4e-c78a-4d86-ab4edf5673f2Group Index: 2

                                                    522.Speaker 0: Bhaal will never again have cause to question my devotion.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fbf5a41c-1265-1b08-aa02-060207b47ae0Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h69edc6aege460g4a23g9e57gab66ffad4edfText UUID: 2ee31ca5-db26-468e-b51e-388e1627b756Group ID: 00fd7509-ab4e-c78a-4d86-ab4edf5673f2Group Index: 3

                                                      192.Speaker 0: Not even for a Slayer-Lord.ORI_DarkUrge_State_GivenSlayerForm

                                                      Flags and Tags

                                                      checktype Global
                                                      • ORI_DarkUrge_State_GivenSlayerForm {14aec5bc-1013-4845-96ca-20722c5219e3} = True

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5e04dc66-c5f4-e31f-ada9-7a5f21389d61Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h6ed45913g0554g4a34ga789g63d916033e94Text UUID: 2417b7a0-40d8-4eba-bc36-f6d0cb4646cbTimeline Phase Index: 185Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5e04dc66-c5f4-e31f-ada9-7a5f21389d61Timeline Phase Duration: 3.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                      • •
                                                        144.Speaker 0: You will die as you have lived, a heretic, forgotten, and unloved. Blood to blood is Bhaal's sacrifice. And I shall be the knife that spills it. [End]

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 42f1718a-8f0c-5b8f-8787-2ad9175fbc8aSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h85ce485fgf050g4774gb146ge2e14312726fText UUID: 36825b81-0f1c-4e6e-8f8c-74e7f02c7024Timeline Phase Index: 203Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 42f1718a-8f0c-5b8f-8787-2ad9175fbc8aTimeline Phase Duration: 19.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 3End Node: True
                                                    • +

                                              428.Speaker 0: Your hubris will be your undoing, as it was once mine.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d2a77f40-bba6-5ec1-b2dd-4986f09dccf4Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: ha5ab8290g594bg492agb822g24d5cba4bf70Text UUID: 1222c1f3-5d2b-48ee-a1a0-c523e6234a8cTimeline Phase Index: 201Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d2a77f40-bba6-5ec1-b2dd-4986f09dccf4Timeline Phase Duration: 17.62sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: d2a77f40-bba6-5ec1-b2dd-4986f09dccf4Group Index: 0Addressed Speaker: 2

                                                92.Speaker 0: Only this time you will fall. And Bhaal will have his offering - by my hand. [End]

                                          170.Speaker 0: And so the Grand Harper raises her weapons against Sarevok once more.

                                          Metadata

                                          • See Node 5 (Speaker 0) You disappoint me, child of Bhaal. I had heard such tales of you - tales of grandeur, and vile glory.

                          • See Node 222 (Jaheira) Sarevok, Bhaal's least favourite son. Still tied to daddy's apron strings, I see.

                          300.Speaker 0: As you stood a statue, Stone Lord, a helpless ornament, your city changed. Warped. Became ripe for the plucking.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9404d491-c8e1-a163-b8cf-91d2e73238d4Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hfd46fb21gc152g41cbga138gdd38cd1f0fe6Text UUID: aaae51d8-b764-41a5-85bd-a4326049d290Timeline Phase Index: 51Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9404d491-c8e1-a163-b8cf-91d2e73238d4Timeline Phase Duration: 13.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • +
                            114.Speaker 7: While you wriggled 'neath the city's soil like the worm that you are. It will please my hamster to kill you twice, Sarevok.

                            509.Player: You seem to know me. Have we met before?

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f6354429-c630-bbba-188e-26caee2994e9Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hb6aff6a1ge213g48bfgbd33gd6165c792941Text UUID: 8e4b9994-f9b0-44e0-b3b3-7c9e599aacedShow Once: True
                            • +
                              413.No Speaker: Alias to Node 50
                              • +
                                50.Speaker 0: In times past I was Bhaal's Deathbringer - his acolyte. And you, his favourite child.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 12d55f39-9493-2ab9-b55d-50344dbbcdffSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hd20847bdg823dg4aebg8fcdg4123a7a6f319Text UUID: 2f06acb2-072d-4065-bb27-01f9bf864e62Timeline Phase Index: 137Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 12d55f39-9493-2ab9-b55d-50344dbbcdffTimeline Phase Duration: 21.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 12d55f39-9493-2ab9-b55d-50344dbbcdffGroup Index: 0
                                • +
                                  89.Speaker 0: You worshipped Him the way that he would wish - your blood-lust innate, your thirst for butchery unslakable.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 238849eb-bc23-134e-e221-314b963d33d6Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h6a3c85a2gc076g46eeg8f50gbe973cdfe462Text UUID: d42fd5cb-d78b-4a93-9e61-b1dc6b237171Group ID: 12d55f39-9493-2ab9-b55d-50344dbbcdffGroup Index: 1
                                  • +
                                    512.Speaker 0: But you were foolish enough to think yourself untouchable. You didn't see Orin rising through the ranks.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f7b5a15c-0549-f307-89a8-f8e2c04eacaeSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h491391a7g26c2g4293g82bbgb7eca9ca6144Text UUID: 039fccf8-cf76-4022-8724-30c134e7217dTimeline Phase Index: 175Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f7b5a15c-0549-f307-89a8-f8e2c04eacaeTimeline Phase Duration: 47.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1934.75s; OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 1955.7s; Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1961.34s; Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1981.02sGroup ID: f7b5a15c-0549-f307-89a8-f8e2c04eacaeGroup Index: 0
                                    • +
                                      181.Speaker 0: You were blinded by her artistry, her devotion - you believed she worshipped you as much as all the others.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 57ebc714-ab8d-5464-568b-8c8da935328bSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h2ba31fdcgf9d4g4899ga300g3a8a987f0824Text UUID: a8961747-516c-4673-b1c6-0f6f854bf63cGroup ID: f7b5a15c-0549-f307-89a8-f8e2c04eacaeGroup Index: 1
                                      • +
                                        494.Speaker 0: Your fall was as spectacular as your birth - the purest Bhaalspawn there ever was, ruined by his own hubris.MaleFemale

                                          219.Speaker 0: But now, you have returned. Tell me, are you here to have your vengeance on my granddaughter?LOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_Sarevok_OrinGranddaughter

                                          • +
                                            67.Player: I've come to slay her. Where is she?ORI_DarkUrge_State_GivenSlayerForm

                                            • +
                                              49.Speaker 0: I see why Orin spoke of you with daggered spite.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 12c0ec83-482f-bdcd-6468-e2f38f544e61Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hca4e71d7g506fg4c86g8d74g2553116a9f02Text UUID: f368fd1a-3991-440f-8823-fd347b2513f2Timeline Phase Index: 136Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 12c0ec83-482f-bdcd-6468-e2f38f544e61Timeline Phase Duration: 13.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 1459.11sGroup ID: 12c0ec83-482f-bdcd-6468-e2f38f544e61Group Index: 0
                                              • +
                                                452.Speaker 0: But this is not her dwelling place. Orin resides within our Father's Temple.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: de5caedc-42f7-5a3c-fafe-949dd29f9d34Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hedb554a4g33fcg4dd6gad98g6cac68eb0ff8Text UUID: 033e2f79-f32a-49c1-9677-5d6caf5e87d5Group ID: 12c0ec83-482f-bdcd-6468-e2f38f544e61Group Index: 1
                                                • +
                                                  357.Speaker 0: She may have usurped you once, but all her rites and rituals will never match her to your natural gift.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b2dd6519-5b20-c71b-25d7-93d25e007eefSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h6bc22b9dg31bdg4ce8gb078gabd4140fb921Text UUID: abfa0e7c-cf04-4db3-af55-467516b681cdTimeline Phase Index: 123Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b2dd6519-5b20-c71b-25d7-93d25e007eefTimeline Phase Duration: 47.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 9Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1264.9s; OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 1273.03s; Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1277.04s; Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1304.04sGroup ID: b2dd6519-5b20-c71b-25d7-93d25e007eefGroup Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    351.Speaker 0: Bhaal is about to name a new Chosen. All is between you and my granddaughter Orin now, and Orin has much to learn.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b1aeae35-b0b6-8af9-430b-b28d49270212Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hfa705841gab98g45b4ga83eg4eef8d80aadaText UUID: 3cd85451-85cd-4d43-b82c-1bdc6dd26387Group ID: b2dd6519-5b20-c71b-25d7-93d25e007eefGroup Index: 1
                                                    • +
                                                      160.Speaker 0: Our lord does not care for beauty. Bhaal cares only for death. Death in numbers. Death in droves.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4a1247b8-4d0b-b5ca-9580-89a0bf686d3fSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h9b9097a8ga0f2g46c6gb8f0g44bdda0cd81fText UUID: 93c88d98-7a25-4392-9a84-80e31ccd76dbGroup ID: b2dd6519-5b20-c71b-25d7-93d25e007eefGroup Index: 2
                                                      • +
                                                        116.Speaker 0: It is a lesson Orin will only learn in death. I wonder if you will be the one to teach her?

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 35e5f29e-f76d-4208-1452-9c1942507cb5Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h4944d4dbgadb8g48bbg95a3gd7614f6dea91Text UUID: 493f5f9a-c9d7-4de4-baf0-c695fac955b3Group ID: b2dd6519-5b20-c71b-25d7-93d25e007eefGroup Index: 3
                                                        • +
                                                          158.Player: She has already challenged me herself. We will duel to the death. GLO_OrinsAbduction_State_AbductionOccured

                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                          checktype Global
                                                          • GLO_OrinsAbduction_State_AbductionOccured {98dda46d-871c-4807-aced-5dc3ff5f4c2d} = True

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 49a799a8-8d4b-759d-301c-89b16d78bf26Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h5da08d16g4387g4cd1ga46bgc0c16dd50ff8Text UUID: cac1288e-2ae3-4476-a125-35ce2b52413fShow Once: True
                                                          • +
                                                            227.Speaker 0: She seeks to sacrifice you in our Father's temple. GLO_Orin_Knows_OrinLocation

                                                            Flags and Tags

                                                            settype Global
                                                            • GLO_Orin_Knows_OrinLocation {72767edb-8b64-4337-5159-7535315cee0f} = True

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 705c5cb6-4799-ff35-9042-fe52d7f358f8Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: he08df738g6435g4cbagafeeg9c13bf0c4cf8Text UUID: a2bd59e6-d80b-481f-b8a4-a4a46b1a6d7bTimeline Phase Index: 160Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 705c5cb6-4799-ff35-9042-fe52d7f358f8Timeline Phase Duration: 5.39sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                            • +
                                                              231.Speaker 0: She dreams that your corpse will be her masterpiece, but she forgets - before your incident, you were the true master.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 73dbc565-0919-18a2-6b7f-2fa214cf6fd5Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hccec508cg7908g4d74gbacbgeebb1168ec4fText UUID: a0627374-9f5d-4478-8c55-694b789cf3fdTimeline Phase Index: 151Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 73dbc565-0919-18a2-6b7f-2fa214cf6fd5Timeline Phase Duration: 27.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1681.48s; OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 1690.18s; Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1693.31sGroup ID: 73dbc565-0919-18a2-6b7f-2fa214cf6fd5Group Index: 0
                                                              • +
                                                                430.Speaker 0: You were murder. Pure murder. No excesses. No pretentions.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d3a58711-eada-a773-57b4-285c0cb5ce81Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h37b954a5g32d6g414fgb4dcg1ec52b2da56dText UUID: 5ac459e6-ca35-4d7a-bf64-6705cc4a3ae8Group ID: 73dbc565-0919-18a2-6b7f-2fa214cf6fd5Group Index: 1
                                                                • +
                                                                  210.Speaker 0: I believe you will be the one to slay Orin.LOW_MuderTribunal_HasMet_DarkUrgeSarevok

                                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                                  settype Global
                                                                  • LOW_MuderTribunal_HasMet_DarkUrgeSarevok {dbea3c7d-7406-4afc-e13f-2c5e53dbdc79} = True

                                                                  • +
                                                                    332.Speaker 0: And when you do, remember grandfather Sarevok. Remember how he helped you. Return to visit him, and tell the blood-drenched tale of your victory.ORI_DarkUrge_State_GivenSlayerForm

                                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                                    checktype Global
                                                                    • ORI_DarkUrge_State_GivenSlayerForm {14aec5bc-1013-4845-96ca-20722c5219e3} = True

                                                                    324.Speaker 0: But you will need my help.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a3d5c950-2788-9ba3-ce07-0c7fbbf555d8Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h11683126gb208g402cgb6b2g3bd6cc284482Text UUID: 24274c1c-03ec-4a1c-9dd4-328397f40a56Timeline Phase Index: 178Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a3d5c950-2788-9ba3-ce07-0c7fbbf555d8Timeline Phase Duration: 14.91sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: a3d5c950-2788-9ba3-ce07-0c7fbbf555d8Group Index: 0
                                                                    • +
                                                                      166.Speaker 0: I see you have not embraced your birthright yet. Perhaps with my stewardship,
                                                                      Father will bless you yet.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4c4987b8-5545-5bdb-2d26-1564dbc37c09Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h9b250f36gf38bg472egbf4aga7beb67fa473Text UUID: dbf83d85-0d2d-4f30-aa4c-f89e69518ea5Group ID: a3d5c950-2788-9ba3-ce07-0c7fbbf555d8Group Index: 1
                                                                      • +
                                                                        359.Speaker 0: And when he does, remember grandfather Sarevok. Remember how he helped you. Return to visit him, and tell the blood-drenched tale of your victory.DEPRECATED

                                                                        Flags and Tags

                                                                        checktype Global
                                                                        • DEPRECATED {ba7e717d-0e07-4761-9eb7-b39e77d27a4e} = True

                                                                        • +
                                                                          420.Speaker 0: Before you may return to our Father's fold, I must first ensure that you remain as pure and worthy of his blessing as you once were. LOW_MurderTribunal_Event_HasNoHand

                                                                          checktype Object | speaker 2 Player

                                                                          • +
                                                                            450.Speaker 0: So I ask - why have you brought no offering, child of Bhaal? How am I to lead you in his worship, if you abstain from his most blessed sacrement?

                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                  261.Speaker 0: I sense truth to your words - arrogance, too. Bhaal's children must also learn from him. I had to.

                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                              297.Player: But I do bring an offering, Sarevok.                                                                                       • •
                                                                                        274.Speaker 0: You will make a fine offering to the Lord of Murder - his own blood, returned to him, freed of its ungrateful flesh. [End]

                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8352cb0c-93e6-8dd3-1f8e-09f347c17353Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h4dba5e6dge101g4efag9570ga0ae880b9c15Text UUID: cb4b810a-7eb9-4b24-b07b-b87e2e068df0Timeline Phase Index: 196Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8352cb0c-93e6-8dd3-1f8e-09f347c17353Timeline Phase Duration: 13.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 2End Node: True
                                                                            • +

                                                          • See Node 227 (Speaker 0) She seeks to sacrifice you in our Father's temple.
                                                        • +
                                                          95.Player: I came here to become an Unholy Assassin, not to clean up after your offspring, Sarevok.LOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_UnholyAssassin

                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                          checktype Global
                                                          • LOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_UnholyAssassin {8a939a44-bb4a-d32f-0584-388d248f565c} = True

                                                          • +
                                                            68.Speaker 0: And yet you share a Father - her relation to you is as strong as it is to me, blood kin. Perhaps stronger.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1a77da5f-6da6-f4e0-31cd-1d3d3d339426Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h3b955dc6g0b57g4d40gad51g5bb95a6c06a5Text UUID: 7bfcd2a3-9b8f-462b-ac98-0d80ea35b932Timeline Phase Index: 142Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1a77da5f-6da6-f4e0-31cd-1d3d3d339426Timeline Phase Duration: 8.79sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                            • +
                                                              267.Speaker 0: I have heard of the duel Orin proposed to you. She seeks to sacrifice you in our Father's temple.GLO_Orin_Knows_OrinLocation

                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                              settype Global

                                                              • See Node 231 (Speaker 0) She dreams that your corpse will be her masterpiece, but she forgets - before your incident, you were the true master.
                                                        • +
                                                          110.Player: If you think she needs to be taught a lesson, why don't you teach her yourself?LOW_MurderTribunal_Sarevok_Trial_HeardOrinGranddaughter

                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                          • LOW_MurderTribunal_Sarevok_Trial_HeardOrinGranddaughter {efa0ffe4-ed63-2c31-07ab-a48b9ca1a580} = True

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 32c36c80-e703-db36-f814-d52fd2fe1ab8Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hc4352e30gcec3g444dgbcecgf17e28b3da6bText UUID: dd9c5ab9-5d7d-4f9b-8853-29161a5ce57cShow Once: True
                                                          • +
                                                            378.No Speaker: Alias to Node 91
                                                            • +
                                                              91.Speaker 0: But you - your blood is purer than mine ever was. He made you himself. The perfect killer.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 26e44bb8-f24c-4faf-ebbf-2d199b0fc22cSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h9bea3a63gd9f0g41c1g9a86g56328b736c8fText UUID: 6909f1e5-1023-41a2-a150-07e9436e2c32Timeline Phase Index: 105Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 26e44bb8-f24c-4faf-ebbf-2d199b0fc22cTimeline Phase Duration: 15.37sTimeline Phase Shots: 4
                                                              • See Node 267 (Speaker 0) I have heard of the duel Orin proposed to you. She seeks to sacrifice you in our Father's temple.
                                                          • +
                                                            256.Speaker 0: We fought already. She bested me, humiliated me, enclosed me in this chamber with Bhaal's unending disappointment. I am a failure to Him. DEPRECATED

                                                            Flags and Tags

                                                            checktype Global
                                                            • DEPRECATED {ba7e717d-0e07-4761-9eb7-b39e77d27a4e} = True

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7e65fe97-e7e0-2e8a-a19c-3113da495506Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: ha624e872g1950g4dbdga913g15abb7ad2b4bText UUID: 7d5afd16-d0ee-42de-8005-81bffcc32ad4Timeline Phase Index: 36Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7e65fe97-e7e0-2e8a-a19c-3113da495506Timeline Phase Duration: 16.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                                                            • See Node 91 (Speaker 0) But you - your blood is purer than mine ever was. He made you himself. The perfect killer.
                                                        • +
                                                          527.Player: You want me to kill your own granddaughter?

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fed09416-3988-2cd1-c90e-6f6525fd3584Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h5e41484bgafc6g4f70g9fe9g09be7583afe3Text UUID: f7d94247-3521-4982-a5da-99e69f655557Show Once: True
                                                          • +
                                                            203.Speaker 0: She wronged me. In killing her, you honour our Father with a eulogy of blood.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 63989bee-28c6-96ac-60f3-295a640ae689Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h560de987g02e4g41b7g9c99g7b7cbb683142Text UUID: 6272ce29-5b4c-4e59-9e23-1b84b2282174Timeline Phase Index: 168Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 63989bee-28c6-96ac-60f3-295a640ae689Timeline Phase Duration: 8.71sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                            • See Node 267 (Speaker 0) I have heard of the duel Orin proposed to you. She seeks to sacrifice you in our Father's temple.
                                                        • +
                                                          196.Player: I shall gladly step aside for Orin. I have no interest in pursuing Bhaal's favour.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5fda54f9-fab7-fdc5-6a1a-ffb54c847be9Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: ha451a4cag488eg41d4g9169g7b3257e3b5f9Text UUID: 4f48f9b3-ae60-44ba-8a62-5cecaeea6870Show Once: True
                                                          • +
                                                            353.Speaker 0: Why do you speak such heresy, child? Bhaal may favour you yet. You are the true inheritor after all.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b1f26346-eb10-0d03-2877-141cfb9c73e5Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h47e1553bg48dbg46acg8d2bg768bc3c74468Text UUID: 9d13dd46-cfbc-491b-a0a7-275f13f70357Timeline Phase Index: 26Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b1f26346-eb10-0d03-2877-141cfb9c73e5Timeline Phase Duration: 11.19sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
