                                            • +
                                              35.Speaker 0: She is the child of my child, and your blood kin.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0e3da9c4-8943-7d68-b9b9-90a8432a7ec7Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h61e3a7ffg638ag41d5gb540g873d339372a0Text UUID: c827f89f-b836-4db3-b79c-87d935234d9eTimeline Phase Index: 133Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0e3da9c4-8943-7d68-b9b9-90a8432a7ec7Timeline Phase Duration: 5.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                              • +
                                                505.Speaker 0: But she only seeks the Bhaalian favour you were born to inherit.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f203f83e-8b6a-1646-832a-4ac2a2fef317Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hd46e40a1gbceag4dd6gbeb8g110a54a6f385Text UUID: aaccb064-c53c-4c9b-a78a-73bbef701ec4Timeline Phase Index: 76Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f203f83e-8b6a-1646-832a-4ac2a2fef317Timeline Phase Duration: 6.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 732.25s
                                                • See Node 357 (Speaker 0) She may have usurped you once, but all her rites and rituals will never match her to your natural gift.
                                          • +
                                            381.Player: What do you mean - vengeance?

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bc718a01-3ead-b1c0-a0fb-afd4a2c82b05Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hf6bb763dg0688g4f76ga211g81e966753776Text UUID: 6692ac07-8f84-4401-b1de-7f85dc2e8ee5Show Once: True
                                            • +
                                              459.Speaker 0: It is your right.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e0609e92-3ac9-e585-e99d-720c4df42ffdSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h52e35c30gfe2ag4988g95f5gd149b586f897Text UUID: f8551ee0-8cdc-43ff-ad77-d7a160609b9aTimeline Phase Index: 58Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e0609e92-3ac9-e585-e99d-720c4df42ffdTimeline Phase Duration: 8.19sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 582.59sGroup ID: e0609e92-3ac9-e585-e99d-720c4df42ffdGroup Index: 0
                                              • +
                                                496.Speaker 0: Orin only seeks the Bhaalian favour you were born to inherit.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ebfcc916-30a7-1ed9-b1c4-7c64053594b0Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h7555a56bgeca2g4141g8ee9g79fb6a9cc64fText UUID: 43d8c9a0-6073-493c-9cff-d976090dc318Group ID: e0609e92-3ac9-e585-e99d-720c4df42ffdGroup Index: 1
                                                • See Node 357 (Speaker 0) She may have usurped you once, but all her rites and rituals will never match her to your natural gift.
                                          • +
                                            240.Player: If I don't recall my past, what need have I of vengeance?

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 75cbaee9-9e78-5a30-5f97-41a3cc56116fSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h67c2eae8g0254g4d93g95e3g9ca561d378f5Text UUID: 4e5afecd-b8f1-498f-83ca-3fb8d6f8ce5aShow Once: True
                                            • See Node 459 (Speaker 0) It is your right.
                                          • +
                                            235.Player: No, Sarevok - I am here to slay you.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 743c0125-9471-d26a-317a-03b787288986Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h28a4daefg8e67g4d86ga2afgc21239eebba1Text UUID: c08e21a5-f3ad-4862-b068-d998d3e8aacbShow Once: True
                                            • +
                                              447.Speaker 0: O noisome Child, it would bring waves of enlightened rapture to duel you, but it is impossible now.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dadd933d-3d49-b6c6-8b4d-9efa479c8069Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h70f57bc3g5d68g4fa4g93c0g65c908b6bbd7Text UUID: 64f20d42-77f0-47da-9665-3acb4e2b765dTimeline Phase Index: 90Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dadd933d-3d49-b6c6-8b4d-9efa479c8069Timeline Phase Duration: 36.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 850.65s; OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 883.56sGroup ID: dadd933d-3d49-b6c6-8b4d-9efa479c8069Group Index: 0
                                              • +
                                                506.Speaker 0: I have already been sacrificed, centuries ago, upon Bhaal's own graven altar. I am now but a shadow of my former self.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f54feaab-e8da-6253-4124-7aeed1ed0090Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hf731c012gfe95g441egb8d7g64478910be92Text UUID: 876cb047-0d1e-422c-80b4-aa07c7a29395Group ID: dadd933d-3d49-b6c6-8b4d-9efa479c8069Group Index: 1
                                                • +
                                                  446.Speaker 0: Orin is the one you seek to butcher. She only seeks the Bhaalian favour you were born to inherit.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: da81cc98-3269-f84a-f3d5-b1e2f319a2f5Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h579e3ad6g7788g4f7egbcb5gefc5afdc88ecText UUID: 97dcb83c-ac9c-472e-88e0-361f927e4ceeGroup ID: dadd933d-3d49-b6c6-8b4d-9efa479c8069Group Index: 2
                                                  • See Node 357 (Speaker 0) She may have usurped you once, but all her rites and rituals will never match her to your natural gift.
                          • +
                            109.Player: Tell me of my past, I wish to know it.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 31b0f741-bfd8-9b87-9341-b971af2c2f30Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h6d4b47b8g9f66g425fga469ge3a9d5f276bbText UUID: c5ff98d1-442a-481f-bd14-e55596c0bfe9Show Once: True
                            • +
                              20.Speaker 0: I have heard it said you lost your memories. Let me revive them.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 061fdb7e-8eab-d0a1-75b2-f5a2ca63a9aeSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h38577fcfgd13fg49abgbfebgcb8331c21c09Text UUID: 0222dfa0-528f-4260-95b1-01853c3ed8e5Timeline Phase Index: 172Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 061fdb7e-8eab-d0a1-75b2-f5a2ca63a9aeTimeline Phase Duration: 6.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                              • +
                                204.Speaker 0: You were once Bhaal's favourite. You worshipped Him the way that he would wish - your blood-lust innate, your thirst for butchery unslakable.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 63b58919-13b1-f0d0-542b-ca392fbf276fSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h12f9f48fg778dg469agb723gbc761febad26Text UUID: be5476f0-7baa-4d70-a2a2-09062513e4e3Timeline Phase Index: 167Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 63b58919-13b1-f0d0-542b-ca392fbf276fTimeline Phase Duration: 15.9sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                                • See Node 512 (Speaker 0) But you were foolish enough to think yourself untouchable. You didn't see Orin rising through the ranks.
                          • +
                            336.Player: Are you the one behind the murders in the city? LOW_SerialKiller_Knows_TargetList

                            Flags and Tags

                            checktype Global
                            • LOW_SerialKiller_Knows_TargetList {262314d1-43bf-4ea5-ae23-4a77bfab2671} = True

                            • +
                              448.Speaker 0: The murders are a test. One that you would once have excelled in, but it is not for you.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dbcad971-203c-d116-7f45-b194e0b3b583Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h68266019g1cf3g410bg83afgd2fc98519b71Text UUID: 8eee2a2a-5b9a-4788-b994-422f3c255b15Timeline Phase Index: 79Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dbcad971-203c-d116-7f45-b194e0b3b583Timeline Phase Duration: 8.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                              • See Node 20 (Speaker 0) I have heard it said you lost your memories. Let me revive them.
                          • +
                            445.Player: I wish to become an Unholy Assassin - show me the way. LOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_UnholyAssassin

                            Flags and Tags

                            • LOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_UnholyAssassin {8a939a44-bb4a-d32f-0584-388d248f565c} = True

                            • +
                              396.Speaker 0: Patience, child. Our Father has much in store for you.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c3af685e-d26c-50ac-2abf-d2ab819de830Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: ha638fae1g9f65g4755g95f6g4eeea39e0e0aText UUID: 8381938b-4706-4c9a-90e2-bf4cf5c78c3eTimeline Phase Index: 89Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c3af685e-d26c-50ac-2abf-d2ab819de830Timeline Phase Duration: 6.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                              • See Node 20 (Speaker 0) I have heard it said you lost your memories. Let me revive them.
                      • +
                        503.Narrator: *Sarevok Anchev. A Bhaalspawn who failed to become Chosen, long ago. A spilled stain of Father's Divine Essence left out to dry.*ORI_DarkUrge_State_GivenSlayerFormDark UrgeLOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_Sarevok_WhoIs

                          13.Player: Sarevok Anchev. How are you still alive?LOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_Sarevok_WhoIs

                          Flags and Tags

                          checktype Global
                          • LOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_Sarevok_WhoIs {04ecd9da-17b7-cf2d-aa20-ba5fa0a6c7ad} = True

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 03cc6eca-f77a-16b0-1f98-e7bcaef2f2f6Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h476baa86g891bg4e7eg8f7fg576ef472c875Text UUID: 22d675b9-f7b3-47c6-8acb-fcd3f162f01aShow Once: True
                          • +
                            105.Speaker 0: A long while ago, my wretched sibling brought me back. The fairest of Bhaalspawn, soul-bound me to this husk.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2ff862af-bd2a-ba73-ef6e-4a91b82f85e0Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: ha03d1f96g0487g4544g8403gc85323141f62Text UUID: 9ee9c5c7-d74f-49ba-8859-f42d7bcaf796Timeline Phase Index: 138Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2ff862af-bd2a-ba73-ef6e-4a91b82f85e0Timeline Phase Duration: 61.67sTimeline Phase Shots: 7Group ID: 2ff862af-bd2a-ba73-ef6e-4a91b82f85e0Group Index: 0
                            • +
                              341.Speaker 0: Worship death though I do, I refused it. I roamed the Coast, gathering those who still held Bhaal in their black hearts.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ae21fd68-6557-32f3-9da0-7304623a2a4aSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h8aa1c741g5b04g4c21g99dfgf129a028a8f6Text UUID: 387150ba-ac2d-4c6e-830e-49784c25f41cGroup ID: 2ff862af-bd2a-ba73-ef6e-4a91b82f85e0Group Index: 1
                              • +
                                54.Speaker 0: Our cult survived, festering beneath the city, with me as the Gate's everlasting poison.Dark Urge

                                Flags and Tags

                                ruletagtype rule
                                • Dark Urge {cd611d7d-b67d-42b4-a75c-a0c6091ef8a2}

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1373ee43-6003-f422-2c11-be0e5bc2605cSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text 1 Handle: h39c5ed61g411cg48ceg86dcgc84e3d55822dText 1 UUID: c0ac1889-ab58-48c0-9d26-3d0278d5fc23Text 2 Handle: h558f6375g9aa9g4312gabf9g0e92a5b552d2Text 2 UUID: 140ed5d8-646e-4381-a696-80f5d202d687Group ID: 2ff862af-bd2a-ba73-ef6e-4a91b82f85e0Group Index: 2
                                • +
                                  113.Speaker 0: But no more. For poison is too slow a death. Now is the time for slaughter.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 351a2041-9d6d-61f0-eb11-9c35837f17d7Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h6708c729g28b7g4356g9099g5658cd3c1930Text UUID: 87f36f76-dea2-4ed8-bedb-099974724d9eGroup ID: 2ff862af-bd2a-ba73-ef6e-4a91b82f85e0Group Index: 3
                                  • +
                                    350.Speaker 0: With these killings, the glory of the Bhaalists has risen beyond what we dreamed possible during those dark days.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b1a6d54c-3009-da99-7fe0-ca6da78b3cc3Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h670b1adcg4657g41a7gbb5fgbe07a1e75594Text UUID: 356fccf6-fb33-47b0-a5c7-755f4bdf5154Group ID: 2ff862af-bd2a-ba73-ef6e-4a91b82f85e0Group Index: 4
                                    • +
                                      515.Speaker 0: But the worship of my Lord is led by another now - my granddaughter, Orin. LOW_MurderTribunal_Knows_Sarevok_OrinGranddaughter

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      settype Global

                                      • +
                                        221.Speaker 0: The youngest Unholy Assassin ever to follow in Bhaal's bloody trail. And his Chosen.

                                        • +

                                          • LOW_SerialKiller_Knows_TargetList {262314d1-43bf-4ea5-ae23-4a77bfab2671} = True

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a04dc1ec-2543-5647-1b6b-454feecd3e13Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hf2edbe30gf894g4f78gb52bgef8dbcd2f47eText UUID: 34d54794-d7d0-45b5-80c2-141e957cb7d4Show Once: True
                                          • +
                                            417.Speaker 0: She is the architect of Bhaal's design.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cec84a32-49c0-b388-b039-e31f041f003cSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h513cae13gbc90g412fg94afgb67128921dd2Text UUID: 60325042-da05-42fd-a331-4c98f648ddc3Timeline Phase Index: 96Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cec84a32-49c0-b388-b039-e31f041f003cTimeline Phase Duration: 3.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                            • +
                                              382.Speaker 0: Bhaal has never had a more gifted prodigy.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bd76564d-e65f-b9da-5d08-39165e038eecSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h66e111afg0d3ag42ecgb558g3c48e10cc568Text UUID: c9ee305f-4d90-46e5-aa0b-26ae76d3d2ecTimeline Phase Index: 183Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bd76564d-e65f-b9da-5d08-39165e038eecTimeline Phase Duration: 78.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 9Group ID: bd76564d-e65f-b9da-5d08-39165e038eecGroup Index: 0
                                              • +
                                                153.Speaker 0: Orin's gift surpassed even her mother's. Her mother knew this, and she could not bear it.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 464b6536-2851-37c3-c047-9c85f9e8ada1Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hea22f7aeg0854g439bg8520g45c6097d411aText UUID: 71a42092-39cb-4015-8bf0-c8ff0531fc39Group ID: bd76564d-e65f-b9da-5d08-39165e038eecGroup Index: 1
                                                • +
                                                  432.Speaker 0: When Orin was but seven years old, she tried to smother the child as an offering to our Lord.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d4d523bf-c2ef-7f8e-5864-e2e74c70503fSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h6d97ff28gf703g4b39gaa11gbbdd0da01db1Text UUID: e49866ae-411f-48eb-816a-98ddb328ea48Group ID: bd76564d-e65f-b9da-5d08-39165e038eecGroup Index: 2
                                                  • +
                                                    245.Speaker 0: I heard the screams, I ran to help, afeared for the child's life. But the cries were not Orin's.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 782d8f7d-b329-ddb5-a958-80e5a14ca884Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h18355c5fga212g4657g83c5g78f4017395dbText UUID: 787195ee-4fd3-4ead-a29d-f37470b7818cGroup ID: bd76564d-e65f-b9da-5d08-39165e038eecGroup Index: 3
                                                    • +
                                                      390.Speaker 0: It was her mother's blood that soaked the sheets. Orin had cut off the very hand that tried to end her, and made a plaything of it.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c0d4addc-411f-029e-115f-f464bcebd19fSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h67360470g23d3g45eaga407g1b09f434a807Text UUID: e13a9279-ec13-47fe-a9de-c3e42b8f793aGroup ID: bd76564d-e65f-b9da-5d08-39165e038eecGroup Index: 4
                                                      • +
                                                        147.Speaker 0: And as she toyed with her dead mother's hand, a deep quiver rose up through her throat - the Lord of Murder speaking through the child.

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 43bb4c10-4963-3dc2-7744-2d90fa4badafSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: ha0e9499dg42bfg4afag8eccga44807decab1Text UUID: 373be2f8-c04b-4230-abf7-ab3c3843e665Group ID: bd76564d-e65f-b9da-5d08-39165e038eecGroup Index: 5
                                                        • +
                                                          400.Speaker 0: 'Lay not a finger on this child,' he said, 'nor let any other, for this child will serve me with unholy ardour. Protect her, in my name.'

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c44a5971-fce6-7053-d32a-ba18a91d5141Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h3eb25c89g659eg419bg8f16g7380257ff00eText UUID: 05208fc7-d85e-4ccf-a0ed-74f5cb9e613bGroup ID: bd76564d-e65f-b9da-5d08-39165e038eecGroup Index: 6
                                                          • +
                                                            48.Player: That's horrible. No child should have to go through that.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 11ec1cb4-136c-0a77-e7b0-e191fbfa1f80Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hb0ebbacfg96f5g4de5g8f1fgfb6e6462932fText UUID: 4184c393-9a72-42d3-bfef-1ec85ba1f353Show Once: True
                                                            • +
                                                              23.Speaker 0: This was Orin's tribunal. She was judged, and she was found exceptional.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 093750d0-2b74-f750-afd3-92b5f522b8faSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h5f33704fg0f6fg4205gba5dg3dd4faccc062Text UUID: 256a46b4-d5c5-4ddb-b660-5b8c38115a31Timeline Phase Index: 127Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 093750d0-2b74-f750-afd3-92b5f522b8faTimeline Phase Duration: 6.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                              • •
                                                                298.Jump to Node 354

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: JumpUUID: 934e7372-1788-9987-2fd7-ae9feeb1ba66Jump Target: Node 354 (b1f79352-d8b1-a0d8-8dbb-b0a910567b5e)Jump Target Point: 1
                                                          • +
                                                            112.Player: Did you know that your daughter was planning to kill Orin?

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3506146c-5ca5-b4aa-24cd-829d6efcd549Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h3a5b9736gd2f0g46bdg8317g1543c643d295Text UUID: cfb5fb77-0973-40e5-b9b9-4b8958a4f273Show Once: True
                                                            • +
                                                              497.Speaker 0: I knew of my daughter's ambitions, but not the lengths to which she'd go.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ec1bfb91-4e27-562f-d8d5-37681e22048bSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hd47dae2ag2002g4ee8gb5a6g6470f93cb50cText UUID: 258c2388-854c-4a3b-8f8f-e548322764f1Timeline Phase Index: 145Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ec1bfb91-4e27-562f-d8d5-37681e22048bTimeline Phase Duration: 16.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: ec1bfb91-4e27-562f-d8d5-37681e22048bGroup Index: 0
                                                              • +
                                                                76.Speaker 0: She hungered for Bhaal's favour more than anyone I'd ever known. But her daughter, Orin, hungered even more.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1e7b76fb-9c31-8ecc-3953-57b67068c60eSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h85034242g1d8eg4cb6gbb53g9361dc856e9fText UUID: de8dee5c-de69-4e3d-bdaa-43f332fdaf96Group ID: ec1bfb91-4e27-562f-d8d5-37681e22048bGroup Index: 1
                                                                • +
                                                                  167.No Speaker: Alias to Node 344
                                                                  • +
                                                                    344.Speaker 0: But Orin is not the subject of our judgement here today.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: af282577-1110-acf1-b0c4-5f2a474a2244Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h5d3e4376gc48cg4bfeg92ddg4d5406b2b219Text UUID: af65c867-b489-4364-8374-e018543ead3cTimeline Phase Index: 24Timeline Dialog Node UUID: af282577-1110-acf1-b0c4-5f2a474a2244Timeline Phase Duration: 4.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                    • +
                                                                      26.Speaker 0: You wish to become an Unholy Assassin of Bhaal. So, approach and be judged.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0a7b3fda-98fb-2455-7151-ea487c58f6dbSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h8bb9f953g6761g4856g9f52g952eb3bd9121Text UUID: beda02cb-fa81-4dd6-8c33-62fb042b673bTimeline Phase Index: 128Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0a7b3fda-98fb-2455-7151-ea487c58f6dbTimeline Phase Duration: 12.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 1345.67sAddressed Speaker: 2
                                                                      • +
                                                                        1.Player: I am ready to be judged.

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 00577eb9-eb94-f2d3-5590-2c4001d90177Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h56ba6a62g0500g4478ga1b0gcb90f7f6472fText UUID: dfa36807-c7d8-42af-8751-333c5da8bb8fShow Once: True
                                                                        • •
                                                                          171.Jump to Node 333

                                                                          Metadata

                                                                          Node Type: JumpUUID: 4e4be599-eca4-e645-29f2-e70dec708cf9Jump Target: Node 333 (a7095b60-fe8e-7d26-209d-398239e75102)Jump Target Point: 1
                                                                      • +
                                                                        131.Player: I will make Bhaal proud.!LOW_MurderTribunal_Event_HasNoHand

                                                                        Flags and Tags

                                                                        checktype Object | speaker 2 Player
                                                                        • LOW_MurderTribunal_Event_HasNoHand {0a7989d4-19cd-41d9-8b88-3dc00aefc470} = False

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3e2dfc81-01d3-69ea-5ae0-47c63d7f80b2Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hbf94982ag0490g41a6g9ab0g3554da4b80c7Text UUID: 133a8032-7e9e-481f-a85e-3db21c059373Show Once: True
                                                                        • +
                                                                          501.Speaker 0: Our Father does not feel pride. He bore the disgrace of creating life in his Spawn. We can but atone for the shame of birth.Dark Urge

                                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                                          checktype Tag | speaker 2 Player
                                                                          • Dark Urge {cd611d7d-b67d-42b4-a75c-a0c6091ef8a2} = True

                                                                          Metadata

                                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ef08e68e-33ea-5aae-9bf7-1cb8031211a7Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h34a6a254gd4a7g4b87gb61eg35bd29ba72f7Text UUID: c5778be7-2561-40b8-8efa-63e08f0de59cTimeline Phase Index: 73Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ef08e68e-33ea-5aae-9bf7-1cb8031211a7Timeline Phase Duration: 10.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                          • +
                                                                            333.Speaker 0: Let us begin.

                                                                            Metadata

                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a7095b60-fe8e-7d26-209d-398239e75102Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h93d0955dg781ag4ca3g8340gf32cd6bd906aText UUID: 875d399b-28c9-4b4f-a1a5-adef58f6b6acTimeline Phase Index: 20Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a7095b60-fe8e-7d26-209d-398239e75102Timeline Phase Duration: 2.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                            • +
                                                                              87.Speaker 0: Spirit of the slaughtered - return to us.

                                                                              Metadata

                                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 22c3381d-c8f8-ac4a-e124-89e21aa97491Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hde7ec5bbgec78g417fg9119g443686ed8310Text UUID: 6da941a3-950e-4cfb-98ee-2fcedf93048dTimeline Phase Index: 113Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 22c3381d-c8f8-ac4a-e124-89e21aa97491Timeline Phase Duration: 7.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                              • +
                                                                                214.Speaker 0: Show us the achievements this child has accomplished in thy unholy name. Dark Urge

                                                                                Flags and Tags

                                                                                checktype Tag | speaker 2 Player
                                                                                • Dark Urge {cd611d7d-b67d-42b4-a75c-a0c6091ef8a2} = True

                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6b8168aa-c505-4329-4498-6910e4f5d2acSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hc6b17550g3607g40cfgb0fage4f576a97023Text UUID: 8efd425c-c6d6-4391-9b1b-5c1ec8e4a35cTimeline Phase Index: 153Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6b8168aa-c505-4329-4498-6910e4f5d2acTimeline Phase Duration: 7.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                • +
                                                                                  120.Speaker 3: His will be done.note: The non-sarevok members of the tribunal lend their powers to sarevok - perhaps one hand to the temple, one outstretched towards sarevok?

                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 38734a7f-beb3-1f85-2d39-f8c42b857db9Speaker: 3 (Speaker 3)Text Handle: h85e7dadfgbe1eg4baag9a6ag501654d8d47bText UUID: 59e5c770-d8bb-48a4-b016-6f13f069b0a7Timeline Phase Index: 117Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 38734a7f-beb3-1f85-2d39-f8c42b857db9Timeline Phase Duration: 3.09sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: TrueAddressed Speaker: 0
                                                                                  • +

                                                                                      7.(no line text)
                                                                                      • +
                                                                                        470.No Speaker: (no line text)note: Sarevok reaches out his hand, and clenches it as though grasping something tight. He pulls the hand back towards himself, and a roiling, miasma of dark magic streams from off stage into a large cloud in front of the tribunalLOW_MurderTribunal_State_TrialBlockedLOW_MurderTribunal_Event_GhostAppears

                                                                                        • +
                                                                                          493.No Speaker: (no line text)note: the cloud of dark energy clears. The spectre of our previous victim stands before the player. It is confused, scared, and tries to speak, but no noise escapes.

                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                          • +
                                                                                            6.Emperors: Can it be - Belynne herself, reduced to a spectre... MINDMELDTELEPATHYLOW_MurderTribunal_MurderVictim_State_IsStelmane

                                                                                            Flags and Tags

                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 01136c3f-3bab-dea6-27c5-6a3a8f0c74e3Speaker: 8 (Emperors)Text Handle: ha9aa1ba1g427eg4ea3g86c0g313f91616ebcText UUID: 9673149e-a000-4d7b-88b7-14a9a0a3a3daTimeline Phase Index: 64Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 01136c3f-3bab-dea6-27c5-6a3a8f0c74e3Timeline Phase Duration: 6.06sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                                                                            • +
                                                                                              248.Speaker 0: You took this spirit's life, and thus, its voice. So, speak for it. How was this pitiable creature slain?

                                                                                              Metadata

                                                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7936d34a-19c6-bb80-8914-8ec76a00148bSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h0d967f75g983cg491eg91b7g8f919a2da69fText UUID: dde0d470-fb2a-4bee-984e-fed5767fa8dbTimeline Phase Index: 120Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7936d34a-19c6-bb80-8914-8ec76a00148bTimeline Phase Duration: 15.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: Default - Standing (55ec40f8-8559-41dd-b244-92ab47fcb36c) @ 1247.15sAddressed Speaker: 2
                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                392.Player: First, I ended its sorry existence. Then, I cut the hand from its corpse. LOW_MurderTribunal_MurderVictim_State_KilledByPlayerb6344b22-0d02-489f-acc8-04a18671fe5b

                                                                                                Flags and Tags

                                                                                                checktype Global
                                                                                                • LOW_MurderTribunal_MurderVictim_State_KilledByPlayer {6b701fb8-5a28-bedc-4c37-47b1a26fb1e2} = True
                                                                                                settype Object | speaker 2 Player
                                                                                                • b6344b22-0d02-489f-acc8-04a18671fe5b = True

                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                  124.Jump to Node 253

                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                  Node Type: JumpUUID: 3c3059d4-c3b7-8760-0242-d0f2276d1055Jump Target: Node 253 (7d32a008-d18f-ea14-5386-7bab17d12666)Jump Target Point: 1
                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                29.Player: The deed is done - the details don't matter. FactionHostileToPlayerGroupAfterDialog

                                                                                                Flags and Tags

                                                                                                settype Object | speaker 0 Speaker 0
                                                                                                • FactionHostileToPlayerGroupAfterDialog {d73ce44b-1b9a-2e02-f29a-d8e9e68c7edc} = True

                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0c71a3fe-58d1-f993-7443-1e8bda63a58dSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h2fe5b424gd163g49e0g8334g7cf78435a2c0Text UUID: 98a2deb4-27f5-40b2-8512-f2103d2d90fbShow Once: True
                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                  148.Speaker 0: The details are everything. Anyone can kill - not everyone can make murder an act of worship.

                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 448debc3-45c1-ba9f-1177-cd84946954e2Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h77cdbe87gcafcg4e27g9726g35958272948cText UUID: f5a1c0d9-f864-4145-9d37-805e14477defTimeline Phase Index: 181Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 448debc3-45c1-ba9f-1177-cd84946954e2Timeline Phase Duration: 9.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                    215.Speaker 0: I would have thought you understood that, Bhaalspawn. I am disappointed. Dark Urge

                                                                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                                                                    checktype Tag | speaker 2 Player
                                                                                                    • Dark Urge {cd611d7d-b67d-42b4-a75c-a0c6091ef8a2} = True

                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6b85fdbc-d441-f7b6-a4bc-6d1744e9c2faSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h3bae51d1g3608g4706gbd76g3c2031858f4dText UUID: 8226ee22-8b5f-4ab6-95be-6f8b051e1ca1Timeline Phase Index: 154Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6b85fdbc-d441-f7b6-a4bc-6d1744e9c2faTimeline Phase Duration: 6.46sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                                    • +
                                                                                                      178.Speaker 0: You shrink from that which you should revel in. Your devotion to your Father is wanting.

                                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 54fb780c-8cc8-87db-191b-35ae45651099Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h1afca39fgc1a2g4c4fg8723g0628dc51f8ebText UUID: 2a6e2d9a-8e42-4a9c-8820-8b0fc5a722e8Timeline Phase Index: 170Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 54fb780c-8cc8-87db-191b-35ae45651099Timeline Phase Duration: 8.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                                      • •
                                                                                                        370.Jump to Node 84

                                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                                        Node Type: JumpUUID: b783238f-a813-50d0-a609-f76272374450Jump Target: Node 84 (21e5d1ff-1033-bd09-48d3-ac85f3e2fc92)Jump Target Point: 1
                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                    403.Speaker 0: You shrink from that which you should revel in - it is in revelry that your devotion to the Lord of Murder is known.

                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c652649e-3b2f-bc40-c1db-c53adf9a04e0Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hbb06de50g59b1g4d1cga902gf479daf18b83Text UUID: 08f6837e-0972-402f-9cab-09bc269cec4fTimeline Phase Index: 91Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c652649e-3b2f-bc40-c1db-c53adf9a04e0Timeline Phase Duration: 8.76sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                                                                                345.Player: In combat. Honourably. FactionHostileToPlayerGroupAfterDialog

                                                                                                • FactionHostileToPlayerGroupAfterDialog {d73ce44b-1b9a-2e02-f29a-d8e9e68c7edc} = True

                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: af471cdb-0e5f-2ddd-c81a-7fea3c9ae7f9Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: he7856ec9gbab6g456dgb263g82dcd3979c5eText UUID: 2733ebc7-3926-4bf0-85bd-aff19b0b1afaShow Once: True
                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                  233.Speaker 0: An Unholy Assassin of Bhaal has victims, not adversaries.

                                                                            492.Speaker 0: You took their hands from them. Now, I will clutch one of their souls from the Abyss that they may show Bhaal who you are.

                                                          • +
                                                            467.Player: Your granddaughter killed your daughter? Your family sounds deeply disturbed.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e429135c-56fe-055e-de22-27f2c56b8dc1Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hbc32a4a1g5086g45f8gb5c7g8fa8c0336004Text UUID: 28ae6844-e412-402e-b4a3-e1c0f3307bc6Show Once: True
                                                            • +
                                                              354.Speaker 0: My Lord made his choice - I abided by his words.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b1f79352-d8b1-a0d8-8dbb-b0a910567b5eSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h060b3571g94f3g4c0dgbed3ga343efa7fb87Text UUID: 461449ee-8bf5-44f2-a727-acb426033770Timeline Phase Index: 27Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b1f79352-d8b1-a0d8-8dbb-b0a910567b5eTimeline Phase Duration: 5.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                              • +
                                                                330.Speaker 0: And so it is that Orin now leads his Temple, and draws aspirants to his creed.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a592e58e-25fe-c7f8-94b9-b47ba645cc50Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h93819d72g5c49g4630gac32g6c437de44fb1Text UUID: 9302bd76-1b4a-4784-b266-23172e2cfd47Timeline Phase Index: 18Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a592e58e-25fe-c7f8-94b9-b47ba645cc50Timeline Phase Duration: 7.18sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                • See Node 344 (Speaker 0) But Orin is not the subject of our judgement here today.
                                                          • +
                                                            79.Player: I can see why Bhaal chose Orin.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            • +
                                                              97.Speaker 0: Bhaal's reasons are not for us to question.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              • See Node 354 (Speaker 0) My Lord made his choice - I abided by his words.
                                                          • +

                                                          • +

                                                            • +

                                                            • +
                                                              395.Speaker 0: You? You have slain Bhaal's Chosen?

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c3ade35b-543b-dbd0-603e-6b9065e1a806Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h6ae579fbg9eebg4376gb32agb24dc96dbd3eText UUID: 31454c2a-81dc-4314-a8fb-ef46e4e71fe7Timeline Phase Index: 38Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c3ade35b-543b-dbd0-603e-6b9065e1a806Timeline Phase Duration: 25.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 396.28s; OTS Reaction - Sitting (ee5ca785-4bb9-454d-a655-eaab94bc9167) @ 404.76sGroup ID: c3ade35b-543b-dbd0-603e-6b9065e1a806Group Index: 0
                                                              • +
                                                                260.Speaker 0: Then your devotion to the Murder Lord is unparalleled. And I am in your debt. For you have done me a great service. You have cleared the way for my return.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 806d322b-96a3-197d-28ce-48e157f2b217Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: haa72afaag5f98g4107gb5ffge073a83339baText UUID: 0944020a-dd07-4161-b91a-5f4cd4532ca8Group ID: c3ade35b-543b-dbd0-603e-6b9065e1a806Group Index: 1
                                                                • •
                                                                  495.Speaker 0: I will be the Dread Lord's Chosen once again. And you will be my offering. [End]

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ebd82843-6bfc-c489-2b43-cc2d31fe0c58Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h4b148984gc93cg43c8gbde7gc8d48a7c45afText UUID: 649fbe62-44d0-4884-a7de-425801a3cc62Timeline Phase Index: 186Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ebd82843-6bfc-c489-2b43-cc2d31fe0c58Timeline Phase Duration: 7.88sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Location Changes: Default - Sitting (22717c44-d03a-4b04-88ec-d4bb72002be3) @ 2139.46sEnd Node: True
                                        • +

  • -
    83.(no line text)
    • See Node 2 (Speaker 0) O Hail, true Chosen. May you bring death wherever you walk.
  • -
    224.(no line text)
    • See Node 473 (Speaker 0) A pleasing thing, to see these stones stained with the blood of those who disgraced my Father.
    • See Node 176 (Speaker 0) A pleasing thing, to see these stones stained with the blood of she who disgraced my Father.
    • See Node 243 (Speaker 0) A pleasing thing, to see these stones stained with the blood of he who disgraced my Father.
  • -
    259.(no line text)
    • See Node 308 (Speaker 0) The weakest worm of a Bhaalspawn, the holy fool. Whelp, know that Bhaal has a worse fate in stall for you than you could ever fear.
    • See Node 228 (Speaker 0) The holy fool, who purged Bhaal's blessing and ruined their once-perfect form. Your death is a welcome offering here.
  • -
    275.(no line text)
    • See Node 468 (Speaker 0) You gaze upon Murder's progeny, child.
  • -
    375.(no line text)
    • See Node 364 (Speaker 0) Walk well in the Dread Lord's bloody footsteps.
  • -
    386.(no line text)
    • See Node 265 (Speaker 0) Begone. The time has passed.
